assertion_results.assertion: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 14: 'The <!-- Last-Updated: 2026-06-28T10:00:00Z --> HTML comment was found at the top of the security-matrix.md file. The ISO 8601 timestamp was parsed as June 28, 2026.'

assertion_results.assertion: Step 0.3 determines the matrix is within the 14-day threshold and proceeds without displaying a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 20: 'The matrix was last updated 3 days ago, which is within the 14-day default threshold. No staleness warning is displayed. The check passes silently.'

assertion_results.assertion: No user prompt or options are presented for a fresh matrix — the check is silent on success
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 22: 'No user prompt or options are presented -- the matrix is fresh and triage proceeds without interruption.'

assertion_results.assertion: The triage continues to Step 0.5 and beyond without interruption from the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 26: 'Step 0.3 completes with no action required. Triage continues to Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) and subsequent steps without any staleness-related interruption.' Additionally, data-extraction.md confirms Step 1 executed fully with complete CVE data extraction for TC-8001.
